zh.lifeSummary: 當Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux於1045年1月19日出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes33歲，母親Gersende du Maine20歲。他於大約1082年與Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois在法國諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1096年登記服兵役。他去世於1102年5月19日在阿曼拉苗拉享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux于1045年1月19日出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，他的父亲Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes33岁，母亲Gersende du Maine20岁。他于大约1082年与Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois在法国諾門迪艾布利易爾-素-易頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1096年登记服兵役。他去世于1102年5月19日在阿曼拉苗拉享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Étienne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux was born on 19 January 1045, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, his father, Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes, was 33 and his mother, Gersende du Maine, was 20. He married Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois about 1082, in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1096. He died on 19 May 1102, in Ramlah, Oman, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux est né le 19 janvier 1045, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Gersende du Maine, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois environ 1082, à Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1096. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1102, à Ramlah, Oman, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux am 19. Januar 1045 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes 33 und seine Mutter Gersende du Maine 20. Er hat um 1082 in Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1096 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 19. Mai 1102 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Ramlah, Oman.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux è nato il il 19 gennaio 1045 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Gersende du Maine, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois circa 1082, nel Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1096. Morì il 19 maggio 1102, nel Ramlah, Oman, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meauxが1045年1月19日にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyesは33歳，母Gersende du Maineは20歳であった。約1082年にフランスノーマンディエウアブレテウイル-スル-イトンでAdele de Normandie Comtesse de Bloisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1096年に兵役登録をした。彼は1102年5月19日にオマーンラムッラーで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux(이)가 1045년 1월 19일 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Gersende du Maine(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1082년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 브레테우이-수-이턴에서 Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1096년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1102년 5월 19일 오만 램라에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.19 JAN 1045–19 May 1102: 1045 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 19–1102 оны Тавдугаар сарын 19

pt.19 JAN 1045–19 May 1102: 19 de janeiro de 1045–19 de maio de 1102
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux nasceu em 19 de janeiro de 1045, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Gersende du Maine, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois aproximadamente 1082, em Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1096. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1102, em Ramlah, Omã, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux родился 19 января 1045 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Gersende du Maine, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois около 1082 г. в местности бретеуил-сур-итон, эур, норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. В 1096 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 19 мая 1102 г. в местности рамла, Оман в возрасте 57 лет.

sm.from 1096 to 1099: mai le 1096 e o'o I le 1099

es.19 JAN 1045–19 May 1102: 19 de enero de 1045–19 de mayo de 1102
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Étienne II de Blois comte de Chartres et de Meaux nació el 19 de enero de 1045, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Thibaud III de Blois comte de Meaux de Troyes, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Gersende du Maine, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Adele de Normandie Comtesse de Blois aproximadamente 1082, en Breteuil-sur-Iton, Eure, Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1096. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1102, en Ramlah, Omán, a la edad de 57 años.
